## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Harmony Anderson (Superhuman) and Marcel Santilli (GrowthX) for AI-driven content strategy and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company, GrowthX, offers AI-powered content creation and strategy services, growing to $4M ARR with 30 clients in under a year](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Superhuman is overhauling its AI product, focusing on team-centric strategies, and preparing for competition from Notion Mail](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Harmony expressed strong interest in GrowthX's services to support Superhuman's content needs and strategic priorities](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)

## Topics

### Personal Catch-Up and Career Updates

  - [Harmony left Outreach after 4.5 years, worked at Hotel Engine (now Engine), and took a 6-month break](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Marcel founded GrowthX after experiences at various startups and a challenging period balancing work and personal life](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Both have young children and discussed the challenges of balancing parenting and work](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Services

  - [Utilizes AI workflows combined with human expertise for content creation and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Offers comprehensive research, strategy alignment, and content production processes](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Demonstrated ability to scale content production (publishing 1 million words per month)](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Showcased examples of successful client work, including technical content and programmatic page creation](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)

### Superhuman's Current Situation and Needs

  - [Focusing on verticalizing brand content and positioning](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Expanding beyond SaaS into sales, tech leadership, VC/startup founders, and exploring ProServe verticals](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Overhauling brand messaging, positioning, and website in Q1](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Lacks a structured content strategy and is considering options for building out content capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

### Potential Collaboration Opportunities

  - [GrowthX's services align with Superhuman's need for a robust content strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage AI for rapid content creation and catch up with competitors](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [Potential for programmatic content approaches, especially around email-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Marcel offered to prepare a preliminary content strategy and opportunity analysis for the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Harmony to create a Loom video outlining Superhuman's strategy and priorities](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1876.0)
  - [Marcel to send pricing information and a sample of GrowthX's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1976.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting for early next week](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1970.0)
  - [Marcel to prepare initial content strategy ideas based on the information provided](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)
  - [Explore potential for GrowthX to support Superhuman's content needs and strategic initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/atUPB3hTx-m4aN_xfZ-gACUH6nxwvQxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
